[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ bottom_divider_style=”wave2″ bottom_divider_color=”#f5e9ad” bottom_divider_height=”50px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_code _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]In your html page, add the snippet and call gtag_report_conversion when someone clicks on the chosen link or button. –>[/et_pb_fullwidth_code][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”Bento Set Menu” text_orientation=”center” _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.5)” background_image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/LX2-45.jpg” background_blend=”overlay” custom_padding=”||88px|||” title_text_shadow_style=”preset1″ title_text_shadow_color=”#e02b20″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Bento Lunch Set

To provide the best bento lunch box in Singapore, we have our own high quality of chefs with decades of experience cooking worldwide cuisines. Please browse our bento lunch set menu below featuring staples such as plain rice, brown rice, sin chow bee hoon, mee goreng, yang chow fried rice and many more. Enjoy your main dish with other favourites such as curry chicken, coffee pork rib, golden oat prawns and signature handmade beancurd. Our bento lunch set comes in a compartmentalized plastic box, to ensure food is properly separated so you can enjoy the flavors of each dish on its own. For our bento lunch set, taste and presentation and of the highest quality so you can be assured that House of Catering F&B will definitely meet your needs. All bento sets come delivered with our custom packed cutlery and sauces. Enjoy your meal with our wide variety of packets drink as a perfect complement to your bento box as well.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” custom_padding=”0px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ width=”100%” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”-4px|auto||auto||” custom_padding=”0px|||||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Comfort Bento Set Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/comfort-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Bento-1.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$8.50/pax Min. 15 pax

All food are packed in disposable microwavable container / aluminum.
Biodegradable disposable cutlery provided.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Scrumptious Bento Set Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/scrumptious-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Bento.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$11.50/pax Min. 5 packets

All food are packed in disposable microwavable container / aluminum.
Biodegradable disposable cutlery provided.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
